name: Ursine Hegemony
description: A dominant, unyielding civilization born not from ambition or a thirst for conquest, but from a profound societal commitment to contentment, comfort, and community.

Hearthguard's Vigil.effect: Increases the faction's strength and endurance by 2

Signal Hearth System.description: Vital network of small, permanently lit hearths
Signal Hearth System.effect: Increases the faction's visibility and detectability by 2

Unstoppable Siege.effect: Increases the faction's strength and endurance by 3

Elite Guard.description: Famed [[Wolverines]] as the Hegemony's elite guard
Elite Guard.effect: Increases the faction's strength and agility by 2

Justice of the Hearth.description: Punishments designed to reinforce the sanctity of the community

Banishment.effect: Decreases the faction's strength and charisma by 2
